B-01.title: PE_ADAPTER_BOUNDARY_ENABLED indeterminado
B-01.solution: flyctl secrets set PE_ADAPTER_BOUNDARY_ENABLED=false antes do deploy + verificacao ssh exit-code

B-02.title: Divergencia release_ref tag branch
B-02.solution: Release unica pe2b-staging-ready; inputs release_ref/git_tag removidos; manifest como fonte de SHA

B-03.title: Workflow nao publicado para dispatch manual
B-03.solution: Workflow endurecido; cherry-pick para main documentado em deployment-governance.md secao 8
pending: Criar tag pe2b-staging-ready no commit PIPELINE.2

B-04.title: FLY_API_TOKEN e DATABASE_URL indeterminados
B-04.solution: Gates pre-deploy: token presente, secrets list staging, DATABASE_URL existe, ref staging via ssh sem revelar valor
